raw_consumer_statement:
I paid {$170.00} to XXXX XXXX on XXXX XXXX XXXX for round trip flight ticket upgrade and was supposed to receive round trip ticket with upgrades within 24 hours. I did not receive complete round trip ticket. 

I called XXXX airline regarding this issue several times ( Dates : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) and third-party agent who initially booked flight before upgrade before filling dispute with American Expres but I did not receive any solution. 

I did not receive complete round-trip flight ticket in 2.5 months which I was supposed to receive within 24 hours of payment. 

Then I filled dispute with American Express on XXXX XXXX XXXX ( almost after 2.5 months ), denied to airline to go with ticket anymore. American Express claim id is XXXX

I received complete ticket on XXXX XXXX or after which was too late. I am not responsible for 3 months delay from airline side.

It also makes it to fraudulent transaction.

American Express denied my claim multiple times and I reopened it again. Last time it was resubmitted on XXXX XXXX XXXX with all information included. Today, XXXX XXXX XXXX, they have requested same information which I have already provided to them.

American Express is trying to sabotage this situation so they don't pay me back {$170.00} which is covered with credit card protection.
